beats.text: WEST HAM STAND FIRM ON THEIR £80M VALUATION
UNITED ARE UNLIKELY TO ENTERTAIN SUCH A HIGH FEE
INEOS PREPARING AN OPENING BID WELL BELOW THAT FEE

caption: The Mateus Fernandes saga hits a new obstacle 🔴 West Ham are standing firm on their £80m valuation of the midfielder — and Sky Sports reports United are unlikely to entertain that price. INEOS are preparing an opening bid, but it won't be anywhere near £80m. A fee standoff is brewing. Is Fernandes still worth fighting for, or should United move on? Let us know 👇 REPORTED — per Sky Sports. #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #transfernews #transferwindow
